ApplyEyeMakeup.intent: A person carefully applying cosmetic products around their eyes to enhance their appearance.
ApplyEyeMakeup.motion: Small, precise hand movements using an applicator or brush near the eye area.
ApplyEyeMakeup.object: Mascara, eyeliner, eye shadow, and a mirror.

ApplyLipstick.intent: A person applying color or balm to their lips using a cosmetic stick.
ApplyLipstick.motion: A gentle gliding motion of the hand across the upper and lower lips.
ApplyLipstick.object: A tube of lipstick, lip balm, and a mirror.

Archery.intent: A person aiming to hit a distant target with precision.
Archery.motion: A slow tensioning of the arms followed by a sudden release.
Archery.object: A bow, an arrow, and a circular target board.

BabyCrawling.intent: An infant moving forward across a surface on their hands and knees.
BabyCrawling.motion: Alternating movements of the limbs in a rhythmic, crawling fashion.
BabyCrawling.object: A flat floor, carpet, or play mat.

BalanceBeam.intent: A gymnast performing artistic movements while maintaining balance on a narrow elevated beam.
BalanceBeam.motion: Graceful walking, jumping, and spinning movements on a narrow surface.
BalanceBeam.object: A padded balance beam and a gymnastics floor mat.

BandMarching.intent: A group of musicians playing instruments while walking in a coordinated formation.
BandMarching.motion: Synchronized high-stepping or rhythmic walking while holding and playing instruments.
BandMarching.object: Musical instruments like trumpets, drums, and trombones, and uniforms.

BaseballPitch.intent: A baseball player throwing a ball towards a batter with force and accuracy.
BaseballPitch.motion: A wind-up motion followed by a powerful overhand or sidearm throw.
BaseballPitch.object: A baseball, a pitcher's mound, and a glove.

Basketball.intent: A person shooting a basketball toward a hoop to score points.
Basketball.motion: A jumping motion or set shot involving an overhead release of the ball.
Basketball.object: A basketball, a hoop, and a backboard.

BasketballDunk.intent: A basketball player jumping high to forcefully put the ball directly through the hoop.
BasketballDunk.motion: A powerful leap toward the rim followed by a downward thrust of the ball.
BasketballDunk.object: A basketball, a hoop, and a rim.

BenchPress.intent: A person lifting a weighted barbell upwards while lying on a flat bench.
BenchPress.motion: Lowering the barbell to the chest and then pushing it back up to arm's length.
BenchPress.object: A barbell, weight plates, and a weight bench.

Biking.intent: A person riding a bicycle for exercise, transportation, or sport.
Biking.motion: A continuous pedaling motion of the legs while steering with the arms.
Biking.object: A bicycle, a helmet, and a road or trail.

Billiards.intent: A person using a cue stick to strike balls into pockets on a pool table.
Billiards.motion: A precise forward thrust of the cue stick towards the cue ball.
Billiards.object: A pool table, billiard balls, and a cue stick.

BlowDryHair.intent: A person using a handheld hair dryer to dry or style their hair.
BlowDryHair.motion: Moving a hair dryer back and forth while running a hand or brush through the hair.
BlowDryHair.object: A handheld hair dryer and a hairbrush.

BlowingCandles.intent: A person exhaling air to extinguish lit candles, typically on a cake.
BlowingCandles.motion: Taking a deep breath and then leaning forward to blow air through pursed lips.
BlowingCandles.object: Lit candles and often a birthday cake.

BodyWeightSquats.intent: A person performing a lower-body exercise by lowering and raising their hips.
BodyWeightSquats.motion: Bending the knees and hips to lower the body into a sitting position and then standing back up.

Bowling.intent: A person rolling a heavy ball down a lane to knock down pins.
Bowling.motion: A smooth approach followed by a low, sweeping underhand release of the ball.
Bowling.object: A bowling ball, a bowling lane, and ten pins.

BoxingPunchingBag.intent: A person striking a heavy punching bag for training or exercise.
BoxingPunchingBag.motion: A series of rhythmic punches including jabs, hooks, and crosses.
BoxingPunchingBag.object: Boxing gloves and a heavy punching bag.

BoxingSpeedBag.intent: A person hitting a small, fast-rebounding punching bag to develop rhythm and speed.
BoxingSpeedBag.motion: Rapid, rhythmic circular motions of the fists striking the small bag.
BoxingSpeedBag.object: Boxing gloves or hand wraps and a speed bag.

BreastStroke.intent: A swimmer moving through the water using the breaststroke technique.
BreastStroke.motion: Simultaneous circular motions of the arms and a frog-like kick of the legs.
BreastStroke.object: A swimming pool and swimming goggles.

BrushingTeeth.intent: A person cleaning their teeth using a toothbrush and toothpaste.
BrushingTeeth.motion: Repetitive back-and-forth or circular scrubbing motions with the hand.
BrushingTeeth.object: A toothbrush, toothpaste, and a sink.

CleanAndJerk.intent: A weightlifter lifting a heavy barbell from the floor to overhead in two stages.
CleanAndJerk.motion: A powerful pull to the shoulders followed by a sudden overhead thrust.
CleanAndJerk.object: A barbell, heavy weight plates, and a lifting platform.

CliffDiving.intent: A person jumping from a high cliff into a body of water below.
CliffDiving.motion: Leaping off a high edge followed by an acrobatic fall and a feet-first or head-first entry.
CliffDiving.object: A high cliff and a body of water like the ocean or a lake.

CricketBowling.intent: A cricket player delivering the ball to the batter with a straight-arm motion.
CricketBowling.motion: A running approach followed by a 360-degree rotation of the arm and ball release.
CricketBowling.object: A cricket ball, a pitch, and wickets.

CricketShot.intent: A batsman hitting a cricket ball with a bat to score runs.
CricketShot.motion: A controlled swing of the bat to strike an incoming ball.
CricketShot.object: A cricket bat and a cricket ball.

CuttingInKitchen.intent: A person using a knife to slice or chop food on a cutting board.
CuttingInKitchen.motion: A repetitive downward or rocking motion of the knife-wielding hand.
CuttingInKitchen.object: A kitchen knife, food items, and a cutting board.

Diving.intent: A person jumping from a springboard or platform into a pool with acrobatic form.
Diving.motion: A springy takeoff followed by flips or twists and a clean entry into the water.
Diving.object: A diving board and a swimming pool.

Drumming.intent: A musician playing a drum set by striking the drums and cymbals.
Drumming.motion: Rapid, rhythmic striking motions with drumsticks or pedals.
Drumming.object: A drum set, drumsticks, and cymbals.

Fencing.intent: Two athletes competing in a sword-fighting sport using foils or epees.
Fencing.motion: Quick, agile lunges, parries, and thrusts with a thin sword.
Fencing.object: Fencing swords, protective masks, and white suits.

FieldHockeyPenalty.intent: A field hockey player taking a penalty shot toward the goal.
FieldHockeyPenalty.motion: A powerful swing of the hockey stick to hit the ball past a goalkeeper.
FieldHockeyPenalty.object: A field hockey stick, a ball, and a goal net.

FloorGymnastics.intent: A gymnast performing a routine of acrobatic and dance moves on a padded floor.
FloorGymnastics.motion: Tumbling, flipping, and spinning across a large mat with grace.

FrisbeeCatch.intent: A person catching a flying disc thrown by another person or from the air.
FrisbeeCatch.motion: Reaching out with one or both hands to grab a spinning disc.

FrontCrawl.intent: A swimmer moving through the water using the freestyle or front crawl stroke.
FrontCrawl.motion: Alternating overhand arm strokes and a continuous flutter kick.
FrontCrawl.object: A swimming pool and a swim cap.

GolfSwing.intent: A golfer hitting a golf ball with a club toward a distant hole.
GolfSwing.motion: A full-body rotation and a smooth, powerful swing of the golf club.
GolfSwing.object: A golf club, a golf ball, and a tee.

Haircut.intent: A person getting their hair trimmed or styled by a barber or stylist.
Haircut.motion: The stylist using scissors or clippers to remove hair while the person sits still.
Haircut.object: Haircutting scissors, clippers, a comb, and a salon chair.

Hammering.intent: A person driving a nail into a surface using a hammer.
Hammering.motion: A repetitive swinging motion of the arm, striking the nail head with the hammer.

HammerThrow.intent: An athlete throwing a heavy metal ball attached to a wire as far as possible.
HammerThrow.motion: Rapid spinning of the body followed by a powerful release of the weighted object.
HammerThrow.object: A hammer (throwing implement) and a throwing circle.

HandstandPushups.intent: A person performing push-ups while in a vertical handstand position.
HandstandPushups.motion: Lowering the head toward the ground by bending the arms and then pushing back up.
HandstandPushups.object: A wall (for support) or open floor.

HandstandWalking.intent: A person moving forward while balancing on their hands in an inverted position.
HandstandWalking.motion: Alternating hand placements on the floor to walk while legs are in the air.
HandstandWalking.object: A flat floor or gym mat.

HeadMassage.intent: A person receiving a massage on their scalp and head for relaxation.
HeadMassage.motion: Gentle, rhythmic movements of the fingers and hands across the scalp.
HeadMassage.object: Massage oil or a head massager tool.

HighJump.intent: An athlete jumping over a high horizontal bar using the Fosbury Flop technique.
HighJump.motion: A curved run-up followed by a backward leap over the bar.
HighJump.object: A high jump bar, two vertical standards, and a landing mat.

HorseRace.intent: Jockeys riding horses at high speed to win a competitive race.
HorseRace.motion: Horses galloping rapidly while jockeys maintain a low, forward-leaning position.
HorseRace.object: Horses, saddles, a race track, and jockeys.

HorseRiding.intent: A person riding a horse for leisure or equestrian sport.
HorseRiding.motion: The rider sitting on the horse and using reins to guide its pace and direction.
HorseRiding.object: A horse, a saddle, and reins.

HulaHoop.intent: A person spinning a large hoop around their waist or limbs.
HulaHoop.motion: Rhythmic, circular movements of the hips to keep the hoop spinning.

IceDancing.intent: A pair of figure skaters performing a choreographed dance routine on ice.
IceDancing.motion: Fluid, rhythmic skating movements, spins, and lifts on an ice rink.
IceDancing.object: Ice skates and an ice rink.

JavelinThrow.intent: An athlete throwing a spear-like javelin as far as possible.
JavelinThrow.motion: A running start followed by a powerful overhand throw of the javelin.
JavelinThrow.object: A javelin and a throwing field.

JugglingBalls.intent: A person keeping multiple balls in the air by continuously throwing and catching them.
JugglingBalls.motion: A rhythmic sequence of alternating hand tosses and catches.

JumpRope.intent: A person jumping over a rope as it is swung over their head and under their feet.
JumpRope.motion: Repetitive jumping or hopping while rotating the wrists to swing the rope.

JumpingJack.intent: A person performing a jumping exercise that involves moving the arms and legs outwards.
JumpingJack.motion: Jumping with legs spread and arms clapping overhead, then returning to a neutral stance.

Kayaking.intent: A person paddling a small, narrow boat through water.
Kayaking.motion: Alternating strokes with a double-bladed paddle to propel the boat forward.
Kayaking.object: A kayak and a double-bladed paddle.

Knitting.intent: A person creating fabric by interlocking loops of yarn with needles.
Knitting.motion: Repetitive, small movements of the fingers and hands using knitting needles.

LongJump.intent: An athlete jumping as far as possible into a sand pit from a takeoff board.
LongJump.motion: A fast sprint followed by a powerful leap from one foot into a sand pit.
LongJump.object: A runway, a takeoff board, and a sand landing pit.

Lunges.intent: A person performing a lower-body exercise by stepping forward and bending the knees.
Lunges.motion: Stepping forward into a deep bend with one leg while keeping the other leg behind.

MilitaryParade.intent: Soldiers marching in a synchronized, ceremonial formation.
MilitaryParade.motion: Uniform, rhythmic marching with high steps and swinging arms.

Mixing.intent: A person combining ingredients in a bowl using a spoon, whisk, or mixer.
Mixing.motion: A circular or rhythmic stirring motion with the hand or a tool.
Mixing.object: A mixing bowl and a spoon or whisk.

MoppingFloor.intent: A person cleaning a floor surface using a wet mop.
MoppingFloor.motion: Pushing and pulling the mop across the floor in a rhythmic pattern.
MoppingFloor.object: A mop and a bucket of water.

Nunchucks.intent: A person swinging or spinning nunchucks in a martial arts demonstration.
Nunchucks.motion: Fast, rhythmic circular swings and transitions between hands.

ParallelBars.intent: A gymnast performing routines on two parallel horizontal bars.
ParallelBars.motion: Swinging, balancing, and flipping movements supported by the arms on the bars.
ParallelBars.object: Two parallel bars and a gymnastics mat.

PizzaTossing.intent: A person spinning and throwing pizza dough into the air to stretch it.
PizzaTossing.motion: A circular spinning motion of the hands followed by an upward toss.

PlayingCello.intent: A musician playing the cello by bowing or plucking its strings.
PlayingCello.motion: Rhythmic movement of the bow across the strings while the other hand presses them.

PlayingDaf.intent: A musician playing a Daf (large frame drum) by striking it with their hands.
PlayingDaf.motion: Rhythmic striking of the drum skin and shaking the frame for jingle sounds.

PlayingDhol.intent: A musician playing a Dhol (double-headed drum) using sticks.
PlayingDhol.motion: Powerful, rhythmic striking of both ends of the drum with sticks.
PlayingDhol.object: A Dhol drum and two wooden sticks.

PlayingFlute.intent: A musician playing the flute by blowing air across the mouthpiece.
PlayingFlute.motion: Holding the flute horizontally and moving fingers to cover and uncover holes.

PlayingGuitar.intent: A musician playing the guitar by strumming or plucking its strings.
PlayingGuitar.motion: Strumming or picking the strings with one hand while the other hand frets them.
PlayingGuitar.object: A guitar (acoustic or electric) and a pick.

PlayingPiano.intent: A musician playing the piano by pressing its keys with their fingers.
PlayingPiano.motion: Rhythmic pressing of piano keys with the fingers of both hands.

PlayingSitar.intent: A musician playing the sitar by plucking its strings with a plectrum.
PlayingSitar.motion: Plucking the strings while the other hand slides along the neck to change pitch.
PlayingSitar.object: A sitar and a mizrab (wire plectrum).

PlayingTabla.intent: A musician playing a pair of Tabla drums with their hands.
PlayingTabla.motion: Intricate, rhythmic tapping and striking of the drum heads with fingers and palms.

PlayingViolin.intent: A musician playing the violin by bowing or plucking its strings.
PlayingViolin.motion: Moving a bow across the strings while the other hand presses them on the neck.

PoleVault.intent: An athlete using a long flexible pole to jump over a high bar.
PoleVault.motion: A sprint followed by planting the pole and swinging the body upward over the bar.
PoleVault.object: A vaulting pole, a crossbar, and a landing mat.

PommelHorse.intent: A gymnast performing circular leg movements while supported on a pommel horse.
PommelHorse.motion: Continuous, rhythmic circular swings of the legs while holding the pommels.
PommelHorse.object: A pommel horse and a gymnastics mat.

PullUps.intent: A person pulling their body weight up to a horizontal bar.
PullUps.motion: Gripping the bar and pulling the body upward until the chin is above the bar.

Punch.intent: A person delivering a forceful strike with their fist.
Punch.motion: A rapid extension of the arm to hit a target with the knuckles.
Punch.object: A target (like a punching bag) or an opponent.

PushUps.intent: A person performing a chest exercise by lowering and raising their body.
PushUps.motion: Lowering the body toward the floor by bending the arms and then pushing back up.
PushUps.object: A flat floor or exercise mat.

Rafting.intent: A group of people navigating a river in an inflatable raft.
Rafting.motion: Synchronized paddling with oars to steer through rapids.

RockClimbingIndoor.intent: A person climbing a vertical wall with artificial handholds and footholds.
RockClimbingIndoor.motion: Pulling and pushing movements of the limbs to ascend the climbing wall.
RockClimbingIndoor.object: An indoor climbing wall and climbing shoes.

RopeClimbing.intent: A person ascending a thick rope suspended from above.
RopeClimbing.motion: Pulling with the arms and gripping with the legs to climb upward.

Rowing.intent: A person or team propelling a boat through water using oars.
Rowing.motion: A rhythmic, backwards-pulling motion of the arms and torso with oars.

SalsaSpin.intent: A person performing a rapid turn or spin during a salsa dance.
SalsaSpin.motion: A quick, rhythmic rotation of the body on one or both feet.
SalsaSpin.object: A dance floor and often a dance partner.

ShavingBeard.intent: A person removing facial hair using a razor or electric shaver.
ShavingBeard.motion: Careful, repetitive gliding strokes of a razor across the face and neck.
ShavingBeard.object: A razor, shaving cream, and a mirror.

Shotput.intent: An athlete throwing a heavy metal ball as far as possible.
Shotput.motion: A powerful pushing or 'putting' motion from the shoulder after a glide or spin.
Shotput.object: A metal shot (ball) and a throwing circle.

SkateBoarding.intent: A person riding and performing tricks on a skateboard.
SkateBoarding.motion: Pushing with one foot to gain speed and using the feet to steer or flip the board.
SkateBoarding.object: A skateboard and often a skate park.

Skiing.intent: A person sliding down a snow-covered slope on skis.
Skiing.motion: Rhythmic side-to-side movements to steer and maintain balance while descending.

Skijet.intent: A person riding a motorized personal watercraft (Jet Ski) at high speed.
Skijet.motion: Steering the watercraft across the surface of the water while bouncing on waves.
Skijet.object: A jet ski (personal watercraft) and a body of water.

SkyDiving.intent: A person jumping from an aircraft and falling through the air before opening a parachute.
SkyDiving.motion: Falling in a spread-eagle position followed by gliding after parachute deployment.

SoccerJuggling.intent: A person keeping a soccer ball in the air using their feet, knees, or head.
SoccerJuggling.motion: A series of rhythmic taps and kicks to prevent the ball from hitting the ground.

SoccerPenalty.intent: A soccer player kicking the ball from the penalty spot toward the goal.
SoccerPenalty.motion: A short run-up followed by a powerful kick to strike the ball past the goalkeeper.
SoccerPenalty.object: A soccer ball and a goal net.

StillRings.intent: A gymnast performing strength and balance moves on two suspended rings.
StillRings.motion: Swinging, holding static positions (like the iron cross), and dismounting with a flip.
StillRings.object: Two gymnastics rings and a landing mat.

SumoWrestling.intent: Two sumo wrestlers competing to push each other out of a circular ring.
SumoWrestling.motion: A powerful initial charge followed by pushing and grappling movements.
SumoWrestling.object: A circular ring (dohyo) and sumo wrestlers.

Surfing.intent: A person riding on the crest of a breaking wave using a surfboard.
Surfing.motion: Standing up on the board and balancing while sliding along the face of a wave.

Swing.intent: A person moving back and forth on a suspended seat.
Swing.motion: Rhythmic pumping of the legs to increase the height of the swinging arc.

TableTennisShot.intent: A player hitting a small ball across a table with a paddle.
TableTennisShot.motion: Quick, precise swings of the paddle to strike the ball over the net.
TableTennisShot.object: A table tennis table, paddle, and ball.

TaiChi.intent: A person performing a series of slow, graceful martial arts movements.
TaiChi.motion: Slow, fluid, and continuous transitions between various poses and stances.

TennisSwing.intent: A tennis player hitting a ball with a racket toward the opponent's court.
TennisSwing.motion: A full-body rotation followed by a powerful swing (forehand or backhand) of the racket.
TennisSwing.object: A tennis racket and a tennis ball.

ThrowDiscus.intent: An athlete throwing a heavy disc-shaped object as far as possible.
ThrowDiscus.motion: A rapid rotational movement followed by a powerful release of the discus.
ThrowDiscus.object: A discus and a throwing circle.

TrampolineJumping.intent: A person bouncing and performing acrobatic moves on a trampoline.
TrampolineJumping.motion: Repetitive vertical jumping followed by flips or twists in the air.

Typing.intent: A person pressing keys on a computer keyboard to enter text.
Typing.motion: Rapid, rhythmic movements of the fingers across the keyboard keys.

UnevenBars.intent: A female gymnast performing routines on two horizontal bars at different heights.
UnevenBars.motion: Swinging, transitioning between bars, and flipping moves with grace and power.
UnevenBars.object: Two uneven bars and a gymnastics mat.

VolleyballSpiking.intent: A volleyball player hitting the ball forcefully downward over the net.
VolleyballSpiking.motion: A jumping approach followed by a powerful overhead strike of the ball.

WalkingWithDog.intent: A person walking for exercise or leisure while leading a dog on a leash.
WalkingWithDog.motion: A steady walking pace while holding a leash connected to a dog.

WallPushups.intent: A person performing push-ups while leaning against a wall.
WallPushups.motion: Lowering the chest toward the wall by bending the arms and then pushing back.

WritingOnBoard.intent: A person writing text or drawing on a large board (chalkboard or whiteboard).
WritingOnBoard.motion: A rhythmic movement of the arm and hand using a marker or piece of chalk.
WritingOnBoard.object: A whiteboard or chalkboard and a marker or chalk.

YoYo.intent: A person performing tricks with a yo-yo on a string.
YoYo.motion: Rhythmic vertical or circular movements of the hand to control the yo-yo's motion.
